arts.ttl: Leverkusen ready to fight Dortmund for Sancho
arts.sum: Both Chelsea and Manchester United aren’t counting on Jadon Sancho for the upcoming season, but he’s still a popular figure in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund crash Xabi Alonso's Bayer Leverkusen farewell party to keep sights on UCL
arts.sum: The visitors then took the lead in the 43rd minute as Julian Ryerson fired home to give BVB a 2-1 lead at half-time. Eyeing a vital victory to keep pressure on fourth-placed Freiburg in the race for the top four, Dortmund looked to keep their focus as home coach Alonso and defender Tah received a rapturous ovation from the Leverkusen faithful in what would be the duo's last home game for Bayer 04.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Bayer Leverkusen 2-4 Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Both teams had something meaningful to play for, with Bayer Leverkusen wanting to give Xabi Alonso a winning send-off at home, while Borussia Dortmund are still in the hunt for…

arts.ttl: Dortmund revive Champions League dream in Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen were all over Borussia Dortmund for the majority of the game, but Gregor Kobel’s heroics followed by a precise attacking display from BVB’s attack.
